❌ SCENARIO B — CRL (Complete Response Letter)

  At $15.00: Gross (15.00 − 41.7755) × 8 = −$214.20 · Net: −$217.20
Stop at $24.50 is irrelevant for a CRL gap — stock opens well below.
Do not hold through a CRL hoping for a bounce. Exit at market open.
VERA stop: $24.50 (−41.7% from entry) · TP1: $55 (sell 50%) · TP2: $78 (sell 50%)

📚 Equity Education · Day 6 of 30Concepts not taught in forex/indices
Gross Margin vs Operating Margin vs Net Margin
Three progressively stricter tests of how efficiently a company turns revenue into profit.

Gross Margin = (Revenue − COGS) ÷ Revenue
Raw production efficiency. What's left after paying to make the product. Excludes R&D, SG&A, interest, taxes.
Operating Margin (EBIT Margin) = Operating Income ÷ Revenue
Business efficiency. After paying to run the company (salaries, R&D, marketing). What the business model earns before financing costs.
Net Margin = Net Income ÷ Revenue
The bottom line. After everything — taxes, interest, one-time charges. What flows to shareholders.
Real example — ANET (your holding):
Q1 2026: Revenue $2.0B · Gross Margin ~67% → $1.34B left after hardware costs
Operating Margin ~40% → $800M left after R&D, salaries, SG&A
Net Margin ~38% → ~$760M net income
The 27-point gap between gross and operating margin is mostly R&D investment. A pure SaaS company with no hardware COGS would show gross margin ~80%+ and operating margin much closer to it.

Real example — VERA (pre-commercial biotech):
No product revenue yet → gross margin is meaningless pre-approval.
Operating margin deeply negative (100% R&D + G&A, no revenue offset).
If approved: atacicept gross margin will likely be 80%+ (biologics pricing power). Operating margin stays negative for 2–3 years while SG&A scales up for commercialization. This margin-to-profitability curve is the post-approval investment thesis you'll watch unfold.

The mix-shift concept:
When a company shifts revenue toward higher-margin products, margins can expand even without revenue growth. MSFT Azure (~70% gross margin) growing faster than legacy Windows licensing (~85%) can actually compress blended gross margin while absolute profits rise. Always ask which segment is growing and what its specific margin profile is.

Why experienced forex traders miss this:
In currencies and indices, price and momentum are the signal. In single stocks, a company can grow revenue 30% and still get punished if operating margin compressed — because the market cares about whether the business is becoming more or less efficient as it scales. An EPS beat with gross margin miss is a different story than a beat with margin expansion. Learn to read all three lines, not just the headline number.
